title.en: Rubik's Clock Tutorial 魔表教程

content.en:
Rubik's Clock Tutorial 魔表教程

Notation 标记

Pictures below show the goal state of clocks after turning. The hours used are just examples. Buttons pushed up are shown (yellow circles), buttons pushed down are not. The wheels that one can turn are marked with a thick black stripe. Use thumbs to push buttons down. Use middle fingers to push upper buttons up. Use ring fingers to push bottom buttons up.

Equalize Cross, Turn to 12

Flip Clock with x2', Equalize Cross

Equalize Cross with Corners, Turn to 12

Congratulations on solving the Rubik’s Clock!
